localTerminal.processStartFailed: Failed to start local terminal process.
localTerminal.profileNotFound: Local terminal profile was not found.
localTerminal.sessionCreateFailed: Failed to create local terminal session: {reason}
localTerminal.sessionCreateFailedNoReason: Failed to create local terminal session.
localTerminal.sessionNotFound: Local terminal session was not found.

portForward.ruleActive: Stop this port-forwarding rule before editing or deleting it.

sftp.batchEntriesRequired: entries must contain at least one item.
sftp.batchOperationRequired: operation must be copy, move, or delete.
sftp.batchSkippedAfterFailure: Skipped because an earlier batch item failed.
sftp.batchTargetRequired: targetDirectoryPath is required for copy and move batch operations.
sftp.copyIntoSelfUnsupported: A directory cannot be copied into itself.
sftp.copyTargetConflict: Unable to choose a unique copy target path.
sftp.entryCopyUnsupported: This SFTP entry type cannot be copied yet.
sftp.entryDetailsPathLimit: paths must contain no more than {limit} items.
sftp.entryDetailsPathsRequired: paths must contain at least one item.
sftp.expectedModifiedAtRequired: expectedModifiedAt must be a valid date-time.
sftp.expectedSizeRequired: expectedSize must be a non-negative integer.
sftp.fileReadUnsupported: Only regular files can be opened in the SFTP preview.
sftp.fileUploadRemoteChanged: The remote file changed after it was opened. Refresh the directory before uploading again.
sftp.fileUploadTargetExists: A remote file already exists at the upload target.
sftp.fileUploadUnsupported: Only regular remote files can be updated from an opened temp file.
sftp.fileWriteTooLarge: SFTP text preview saves are limited to {limit} bytes.
sftp.localFileReadUnsupported: The local temp path is not a regular file.
sftp.sessionNotFound: SFTP session was not found or has expired.

ssh.decryptCredentialsFailed: Unable to decrypt SSH credentials. Please re-save this server credentials.
ssh.folderConflict: A folder with this name already exists.
ssh.hostFingerprintUntrusted: Host fingerprint is not trusted yet.
ssh.passwordNotConfigured: Password is required but not configured for this server.
ssh.privateKeyNotConfigured: Private key is required but not configured for this server.
ssh.serverConflict: A server with the same host, port, and username already exists.
ssh.tagConflict: A tag with this name already exists.
ssh.tagsNotFound: One or more tags were not found.

validation.authTypeEnum: Auth type must be one of: password, key, both.
validation.colorKeyInvalid: Color key must be one of the predefined SSH visual colors when provided.
validation.colsRange: cols must be an integer between 20 and 400.
validation.connectTimeoutRange: connectTimeoutSec must be an integer between 5 and 180.
validation.disableCharacterWidthCompatibilityModeTy: disableCharacterWidthCompatibilityMode must be a boolean value.
validation.enableSshCompressionType: enableSshCompression must be a boolean value.
validation.fingerprintAlgorithmUnsupported: Only sha256 host fingerprint algorithm is supported.
validation.fingerprintLength: fingerprintSha256 is required and must be 1-255 characters.
validation.folderNameLength: Folder name is required and must be 1-120 characters.
validation.folderNoteLength: Folder note must be 1000 characters or fewer.
validation.hostLength: Host is required and must be 1-255 characters.
validation.iconKeyLength: Icon key must be between 1 and 64 characters when provided.
validation.noteLength: Note must be 3000 characters or fewer.
validation.passwordRequiredForAuthType: Password is required for selected authentication type.
validation.portForwardRuleNameLength: Rule name is required and must be 1-120 characters.
validation.portForwardRuleType: type must be one of: local, remote, dynamic.
validation.portRange: Port must be an integer in range 1-65535.
validation.privateKeyRequiredForAuthType: Private key is required for selected authentication type.
validation.proxyModeEnum: proxyMode must be one of: default, off, custom.
validation.proxyUrlInvalid: proxyUrl must be a valid http, https, or socks5 proxy URL without a path, query, or fragment.
validation.requestBodyMustBeObject: Request body must be a JSON object.
validation.rowsRange: rows must be an integer between 10 and 200.
validation.scopeAccountIdLength: scope.accountId must be 120 characters or fewer.
validation.scopeDeviceIdLength: scope.deviceId must be 120 characters or fewer.
validation.serverNameLength: Server name is required and must be 1-120 characters.
validation.systemProxyRulesLength: systemProxyRules must be 4096 characters or fewer.
validation.tagNameLength: Tag name is required and must be 1-64 characters.
validation.termLength: term must be a string between 2 and 64 characters.
validation.usernameLength: Username is required and must be 1-120 characters.

validation.notObject: Request body must be a JSON object.

ws.sessionReconnectedFromNewClient: Session reconnected from a new client.
